META_DESCRIPTION: Your Shopify store is connected to FastComments.
HEADING: You're All Set!
DESCRIPTION: Your Shopify store is now connected to FastComments. One last thing: copy your Tenant ID into your Shopify theme blocks.
HOW_TO_HEADING: How to add comments to your store
HOW_TO_STEP_1: Open your Shopify admin and go to Online Store → Themes → Customize
HOW_TO_STEP_2: Add a FastComments block to any page template
HOW_TO_STEP_3: Paste your Tenant ID into the block settings
HOW_TO_STEP_4: Save and publish. Comments are live!
FIND_LATER_NOTE: You can always find your Tenant ID later at
